rationale: Keep this pair because the citing paper’s core design (dynamic state-space/Kalman-style framework with communication interaction and carryover effects) closely aligns with the cited paper’s key contribution (dynamic multimedia synergy model with interaction, carryover, and Kalman filter estimation). Given this strong methodological and construct overlap—not just topical similarity—the citation could plausibly be a theory/method foundation rather than an incidental mention.
